reasoning: 8x zoom reveals a pixel-art octagonal badge with green/yellow/white interior forming a checkmark-like pattern. Positive: limited palette, no gradient shading, no noise in solid fill areas, semantic intent (confirm checkmark) broadly legible. Issues found: (1) Outline inconsistency — border pixels alternate between 1px and 2px thickness on diagonal segments of the octagon, especially upper-left quadrant vs lower-right; (2) Edge AA blending — several boundary pixels between the icon shape and the beige canvas background carry intermediate tone values rather than hard pixel steps, indicating sub-pixel compositing not typical of hand-drawn pixel art; (3) Drop shadow irregularity — the dark shadow cluster at bottom-right is unevenly distributed, with isolated shadow pixels that don't follow a consistent offset vector; (4) Mild asymmetry — left and right halves of the badge differ by 1-2 pixel offsets on the outer boundary. None of these individually are fatal, but the combination of AA blending on solid shapes and the irregular shadow strongly suggest AI generation or automated upscale post-processing rather than clean hand-authored pixel art. No color bleed, no melting details, no pattern tiling artifacts detected.
